title: tectaria angelicifolia
intro: Tectaria angelicifolia, also known as the angel fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria angelicifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by drying the leaves and stems, and is used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
